text: My number is two, one, five, five, eight, three.
The code is four, zero, zero, seven.
The meeting is on Monday, March the third.
Good morning, Usina Cururique. Anna speaking. How can I help you?
Good morning. This is Mr. Costa from the Sao Paulo office. Can I speak to your manager, please?
I am sorry, she is in a meeting. Can I take a message?
Yes, please. Could you ask her to call me back? My number is two, one, five, five, eight, three.
Of course. Could you repeat the number, please?
Sure. Two, one, five, five, eight, three. The meeting is on March the third. Thank you.

Hello, this is a message for Anna Flavia. This is Mr. Silva from the Sao Paulo office. I am calling about our meeting next week. The meeting is on Monday, March the third, at ten o'clock in the morning. Please call me back to confirm. My phone number is two, one, four, four, seven, six, eight, three. Again, that is two, one, four, four, seven, six, eight, three. You can also leave a message on my voicemail. Thank you, and have a good day.

Hello, you have reached the voicemail of Anna Flavia at Usina Cururique. I am sorry, I cannot answer your call right now. Please leave your name, your phone number, and a short message after the tone, and I will call you back today. If your call is urgent, you can also send me an email. Thank you for calling, and have a nice day.

First, the phone rings and Anna answers the call. Then she says hello and gives her name. Next, the caller asks to speak to her manager. After that, Anna takes a message and writes the number. Finally, she says goodbye and ends the call.
She is busy. Can I take a message?
My number is two, one, five, five.
The meeting is on March the third.
Good morning, Usina Cururique. Anna speaking.
